layout_note: Typed attachment table in transposed spreadsheet layout: each COLUMN is one transaction; field labels run down the left (EIF, SP/DC/JT, Security Name, Ticker, Transaction, Amount of Transaction A: None through L: Over $50,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000, Type of Transaction Purchase/Sale/Partial Sale/Exchange, Capital Gain Exceeded $200, Transaction Date). Selected cells are solid-black filled. The 'Transaction' label row is solid black across all 10 columns (formatting/divider, not data). The amount bucket 'C: $1,001-$15,000' is a continuous black band across all 10 columns. 'Purchase' is a continuous black band across columns 1-9; column 10 instead has Partial Sale and Capital Gain Exceeded $200 filled. EIF row blank for all columns. Footer sheet label: 'MS MR Trust Partnership'. 10 transaction columns, all owner SP, transcribed left to right as rows below.

uncertainties.note: security name truncated by the printed column width; visible text reads 'ance Data Systems C' (ticker ADS); full name is presumably 'Alliance Data Systems Corp' but only the truncated text is printed
the C amount band is one continuous black fill spanning all 10 columns including this Partial Sale column; interpreted as bucket C for every column
